subcodes.first_line: O Javád! Hearken unto what the Nightingale of Sorrow warbleth upon the Branch of Grief through that which the hands of the oppressors have wrought [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا جواد ان استمع ما یغرد به عندلیب الحزن علی غصن الهم بما اکتسبت ایدی الظالمین
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @Imam Husayn, @justice and wrath of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
